languages.text: {n}Эоганн сливает в кубок из алембика зеленоватую маслянистую жидкость с резким химическим запахом и протягивает вам.{/n}
{n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн сливает в кубок из алембика зеленоватую маслянистую жидкость с резким химическим запахом и протягивает вам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}
{n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}
{n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn manipula un alambique para verter un aceitoso líquido verde con un fuerte olor químico en un cáliz y te lo ofrece para que bebas de él.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn manipula un alambique para verter un aceitoso líquido verde con un fuerte olor químico en un cáliz y te lo ofrece para que bebas de él.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡从蒸馏器中倒出一种散发着刺鼻化学气味的绿色油状液体。他把液体注入高脚杯中，然后递给了你。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡从蒸馏器中倒出一种散发着刺鼻化学气味的绿色油状液体。他把液体注入高脚杯中，然后递给了你。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn sort un alambic contenant un liquide vert huileux qui dégage une odeur chimique âcre. Il le verse dans un verre qu'il vous tend.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn sort un alambic contenant un liquide vert huileux qui dégage une odeur chimique âcre. Il le verse dans un verre qu'il vous tend.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, bir imbikten kadehe geniz yakan, kimyasal kokulu yeşil, yağlı bir sıvı doldurup sana uzatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, bir imbikten kadehe geniz yakan, kimyasal kokulu yeşil, yağlı bir sıvı doldurup sana uzatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオガンは蒸留器から、刺激的な化学臭を放つ緑色の脂っぽい液体を酒杯に注ぎ、それをあなたに差し出した。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}From an alembic, Eogunn pours a green, oily liquid carrying an acrid chemical odour into a goblet and proffers it to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは蒸留器から、刺激的な化学臭を放つ緑色の脂っぽい液体を酒杯に注ぎ、それをあなたに差し出した。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn gießt aus einem Destillierkolben eine stechend riechende ölige-grüne Flüssigkeit in einem Kelch ein und reicht ihn dir.{/n}
